strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit Master's/PhD in AI-related field as preferred qualification
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting local stakeholder engagement
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep, hands-on AI and cloud engineering experience through agentic infrastructure work and open-source platforms, aligning strongly with the role’s technical demands. His entrepreneurial initiative and cross-stack fluency are exceptional, though the absence of an advanced AI degree and limited evidence of strategic customer advisory roles introduce moderate gaps. His leadership and product-building track record outweigh the missing credentials.
